name: Draw on Path
description: An SVG-like path drawn on via animated trim (tm) from 0 → 100, then held or looped.

path_d.description: SVG path-like string. The tool converts to Lottie bezier shape data.

scaffold_status: STUB — to be filled in during M1. Path conversion likely requires a small helper that turns SVG path d into Lottie shape (sh) bezier vertices.
